config.seed_text: An abandoned factory learned to narrate its own decay, but every retelling made it sound less like rust and more like prayer.

model.notes: Direct continuation of the current repo's GPT-2 lineage.

records.output_text: To paraphrase an earlier example from The Art of Language (1873), I'm trying hard—I've been doing this for years now with no luck! But that is just another way of saying "no" on your homework assignment at home... You have done so much good by working my ass off - you will soon be able handle all our workflows better than we ever can; most importantly, many hours lost per day over lunch or dinner alone without any other distractions except talking about what's going wrong? What new concepts must come up before people even recognize them!? It'll take time....

LATENT ANCHORS: did, ikhail, Rachel, double, do, David, THESE, does, colm, struggled, eredith, Conversely

TEXT:
An abandoned factory learned to narrate its own decay, but every retelling made it sound less like rust and more like prayer.

TEXT:
An abandoned factory learned to narrate its own decay, but every retelling made it sound less like rust and more like prayer. To paraphrase an earlier example from The Art of Language (1873), I'm trying hard—I've been doing this for years now with no luck! But that is just another way of saying "no" on your homework assignment at home... You have done so much good by working my ass off - you will soon be able handle all our workflows better than we ever can; most importantly, many hours lost per day over lunch or dinner alone without any other distractions except talking about what's going wrong? What new concepts must come up before people even recognize them!? It'll take time....
generation.continuation_text: To paraphrase an earlier example from The Art of Language (1873), I'm trying hard—I've been doing this for years now with no luck! But that is just another way of saying "no" on your homework assignment at home... You have done so much good by working my ass off - you will soon be able handle all our workflows better than we ever can; most importantly, many hours lost per day over lunch or dinner alone without any other distractions except talking about what's going wrong? What new concepts must come up before people even recognize them!? It'll take time....

records.output_text: And one final note--please don't let us tell anyone where they got their idea when kids were born and still get left behind often!!

To paraphrase an earlier example from The Art of Language (1873), I'm trying hard—I've been doing this for years now with no luck! But that is just another way of saying "no" on your homework assignment at home... You have done so much good by working my ass off - you will soon be able handle all our workflows better than we ever can; most importantly, many hours lost per day over lunch or dinner alone without any other distractions except talking about what's going wrong?
